features: ►Multi-Function: This 13A extension lead with total power supply up to 3120W, enables you to power up to 4 appliances and 2 USB powered devices simultaneously. Ideal for using in home, offices, entertainment centers and other areas where multiple devices need to be connected.

►Premium Quality: CE and RoHS certified. Built with high-quality components, enhanced circuitry, and flame retardant housing. Keep your electronic devices safe from voltage fluctuations, surges, spikes and lightning strikes.

►1M UK Extension Lead: Heavy-duty 1-metre power cord keeps 4 way UK plug extension lead out of the way. The 1M (3.3ft) extension cord can bring less resistance and heat, eco electricity usage, energy saving and provide a higher safety measure.

►Safety Guarantee:UKCA, CE, BS1363-2/A Approved. We adopt anti-fire material (750℃) and standard copper cord (H05VV-F 3G1.25mm²), high temperature resistant and flame retardant, greatly increase safety and eliminate hidden dangers.
►What You Get: ExtraStar 4-port 2 USB extension lead and our friendly customer service. Any questions about the item, please feel free to contact us at any time and we will reply in 24 hours.
description: Product Description Ports: 4 Way Voltage: 13A/250V~ Max. Load: 3120W USB Ports: 5V/2.1A Wall-mounted: Yes Surge Protection: No Copper Wire: H05VV-F 3G 1.25mm² ExtraStar 4 Way Extension Lead with 2 USB Slots 13A/3120W Wall Mounted Power Strips with Extension Cable ExtraStar is constantly looking for safe and efficient products for improving user experience and creating a new generation of technology and products that truly meet the needs of hundreds of families. Keep packaging bag away from children. Do not use in wet conditions. Do not exceed total maximum load. Do not wire directly to the mains. Fully extend before use. Key Features 2 USB Charging Ports 2 USB charging ports can intelligently detect your device and deliver the optimal current to USB powered devices, up to 5V/2.1A 10.5W totally. Durable and Sturdy H05VV-F 3G 1.25mm² fused copper wire is thick and strong, will not get loosen and deformation easily. Good electrical conductivity will reduce heat and extend life span. Fireproof Material With anti-fire material (750℃) and standard copper cord, high temperature resistant and flame retardant, greatly increase safety and eliminate hidden dangers.
